index.title: Womasulira Resource
index.description: Resource Translator imatsegula zopempha zomasuliridwa ndi makina a mafayilo anu othandizira mu repo iliyonse, mu mtundu uliwonse - woyendetsedwa ndi Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Womasulira Resource - kumasulira mafayilo othandizira okha
index.badge: v3.0 - Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator imatsegula zopempha zokoka zomasuliridwa ndi makina a mafayilo anu ogwiritsira ntchito Azure AI Translator kudzera pa SDK yovomerezeka - palibe ntchito zowonjezera, ntchito yokha.
index.workflowBody: Gwetsani zochitikazo mu CI yanu yomwe ilipo, lozani pa Azure AI Translator, ndipo lolani repo yanu kulankhula chinenero chilichonse chomwe mumayang'ana.

formats.title: Mitundu isanu ndi umodzi ya mafayilo
formats.body: Maulendo ozungulira {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, ndi {restext} okhala ndi mawonekedwe okhazikika a byte.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Gwetsani fayilo {configPath} kuti muphatikizepo ma globs, glossaries, ndi magulu a Custom Translator.

glossary.title: Glossary-ozindikira
glossary.body: Tsekani mayina amtundu ndi mawu amtundu ndi regex yanzeru yomwe imagwira {cpp}, {dotnet}, ndi abwenzi.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + zofewa-kulephera
dryRun.body: Fotokozani matembenuzidwe popanda kulemba mafayilo, kapena kuwonekera cholakwika chilichonse ngati chenjezo pamene mukubwereza.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Yomangidwa pa {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} - zodziwikiratu zoyesanso pa {statusCodes}, palibe HTTP yogubuduzidwa pamanja. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-woyera.

workflowPreview.body: Zinsinsi zitatu, mizere inayi, ndipo repo yanu ndi zilankhulo zambiri pakukankha kotsatira.

cta.title: Kodi mwakonzeka kukhazikitsa malo pa autopilot?
cta.body: Chinsinsi chimodzi cha Azure AI Translator, fayilo imodzi yogwirira ntchito. Womasulira Resource amasamalira zina zonse.

getting-started.title: Kuyamba
getting-started.lede: Onjezerani fayilo ya ntchito, lozani pa zidziwitso zanu za Azure AI Translator, ndipo zochitikazo zidzafufuza repo ya mafayilo a chinenero cha gwero ndikutulutsa abale omasulidwa.

provision.title: Perekani chuma cha Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Pangani chuma cha Azure AI Translator mu portal ya Azure, kenako sungani zotsatirazi monga zinsinsi za GitHub kuti ntchitoyo ithe kuwawerenga:

resource.title: Chitani fayilo ya source resource
resource.body: Mafayilo othandizira amagwiritsa ntchito msonkhano wa {namingConvention}. Mwachitsanzo {sourceFile} amakhala {frFile}, {deFile}, ndi zina zotero pambuyo pa kuthamanga.

output.title: Yang'anani zotuluka
output.body: Ntchitoyi ikatha, zochitikazo zimavumbula zotuluka zitatu zomwe mungathe kuzigwiritsa ntchito mu mafotokozedwe a PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, ndi {hasNewTranslations}. Imalemba chidule cha Markdown patsamba la ntchito kudzera pa {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Masitepe otsatira
nextSteps.recipes: Onani maphikidwe a monorepos, ma glossaries achizolowezi, ndi magulu a Custom Translator.

configuration.title: Kasinthidwe
configuration.lede: Fotokozani kusakhulupirika kamodzi mu fayilo ya config yosungira ndikulola kuti ntchito iliyonse ilandire cholowa. Zochita zolowetsa nthawi zonse zimapambana pamene zonsezi zaperekedwa.
configuration.intro: Sinthani njirayo ndi {configPath} yolowetsa ngati mukufuna malo osakhala osakhulupirika.

fields.sourceLocale: Imagwera kumbuyo kwa {sourceLocale} kulowetsa ngati sikunakhazikitsidwe. Komanso kutumizidwa kwa Womasulira monga {fromLocale} kotero zingwe zazifupi sizidziwika zokha.
fields.toLocales: Mwina mndandanda kapena chingwe cholekanitsidwa ndi koma.
fields.includeExclude: Zojambula za Glob zoyesedwa motsutsana ndi njira zenizeni komanso zogwirizana ndi malo ogwirira ntchito.
fields.glossary: Mawu omasulira pambuyo pa kumasulira amagonjetsa. Mawu ozindikira malire (amagwirira {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Gulu la Azure {customTranslatorLink} - makampani anu / gawo lanu (zamalamulo, zamankhwala, mawu ogulitsa, ndi zina zotero). Kutumizidwa ngati {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Kusakhulupirika kwa {plain}. Gwiritsani ntchito {html} pokhapokha ngati mtengo wanu wa chuma uli ndi zidutswa zenizeni za HTML.
fields.profanityAction: Momwe mungachitire mawu otukwana mu zotsatira zomasuliridwa.
fields.allowFallback: Ikani {false} kuti mulephere kumasulira pamene {categoryId} yanu ilibe kutumizidwa kwa malo ogulitsira m'malo mobwerera ku chitsanzo chachikulu.
fields.apiVersion: Womasulira REST API version. Kusakhulupirika kwa {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Kuyesayesa kwakukulu pa mayankho osakhalitsa a HTTP ({statusCodes}). Kusakhulupirika kwa {defaultRetries}. Mafoni onse a HTTP pa pempho ndi {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Kapu (ms) pa tulo tum'mbuyo kalikonse. Kusakhulupirika kwa {defaultBackoff}. Mutu wa {retryAfter} wa Azure umalemekezedwa ndendende pamene alipo; apo ayi jittered exponential backoff imagwiritsidwa ntchito, yotsekedwa pa mtengo uwu.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Kusakhulupirika kwa {true}. Pamene pa, zizindikiro monga {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ndi mabungwe a HTML amasinthidwa ndi zizindikiro za sentinel musanayambe kumasulira ndikubwezeretsedwa pambuyo pake. Lekani pokhapokha ngati gwero mwadala lili ndi mawonekedwe a placeholder.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Zitsanzo zowonjezera za regex (popanda delimiters) zinawonjezeredwa ku malo osasinthika, mwachitsanzo {angleToken} kwa chizolowezi cha chizindikiro syntax. Ma regexes osagwira ntchito amanyalanyazidwa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Zojambula za Glob zikugwirizana ndi makiyi amtundu wa parser (njira ya JSON dontho, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). Makiyi ofananira amagwetsedwa kuchokera ku pempholo ndikudutsa ndi mtengo wawo wa gwero wosungidwa.

steps.actionInputs: Mchitidwewu umawerenga zolowetsa zomveka bwino kuchokera ku ntchito.
steps.precedence: Pa gawo lililonse logawana, zolowetsa zimapambana; apo ayi mtengo wa YAML umagwiritsidwa ntchito.
steps.validation: Makhalidwe ophatikizidwa amatsimikiziridwa. Ma enums osagwira ntchito (mwachitsanzo {invalidEnum}) amachititsa kuti zochitikazo zilephere mwachangu ndi uthenga womveka bwino.

tone.heading: Mawu ndi mafakitale, m'mawu omveka bwino
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API ilibe batani limodzi la kamvekedwe. Makonzedwe awiri amaphatikizana kuti akupatseni ulamuliro wambiri womwewo:
tone.industryBody: gwiritsani ntchito {categoryId} kuloza gulu la Azure {customTranslatorLink} lophunzitsidwa pa corpus yanu - zamalamulo, zaukadaulo, zamankhwala, malonda, kapena china chilichonse. Ichi ndi chikhomo champhamvu kwambiri cha mawu, mawu amtundu, ndi mawu.
tone.surfaceBody: Gwiritsani ntchito {glossaryLink} kutseka mayina a mtundu ndi mawu a mankhwala mawu, ndipo gwiritsani ntchito {profanityAction} kupukuta mawu otukwana pamene mukuyang'ana malo kwa omvera achichepere.

inputs.title: Zolowetsa ndi zotuluka
inputs.lede: Chilichonse cholowetsa chimavomerezedwanso mu fayilo yosankha repo config. Pamene zonsezi zakhazikitsidwa, kulowetsedwa kwa kachitidwe kumapambana.
inputs.configurationIntro: Onani {configurationLink} kwa schema ya YAML ndi dongosolo lotsegulira.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (mwachitsanzo {en}) yomwe imagwiritsidwa ntchito kupeza mafayilo othandizira monga {sourceGlob}. Komanso kutumizidwa kwa Womasulira monga {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator muzimvetsera kiyi. Pitani kudzera {secrets}.

items.region: Dera la chuma chomasulira (siyani chuma chapadziko lonse lapansi).
items.toLocales: Malo oti mumasuliridwe. Amavomereza JSON array ({jsonArray}) kapena makhalidwe olekanitsidwa ndi koma.
items.include: Mawonekedwe a glob olekanitsidwa ndi Newline; Mafayilo ofananira okha ndi omwe amamasuliridwa.
items.exclude: Mawonekedwe a glob olekanitsidwa ndi Newline; mafayilo ofananira amadumpha (amagwiritsidwa ntchito pambuyo pophatikizapo).
items.configPath: Njira yopita ku fayilo ya YAML config (yokhudzana ndi muzu wa malo ogwirira ntchito).
items.dryRun: Mukakhala {true}, yendetsani matembenuzidwe ndikutulutsa chidule koma osalemba mafayilo.
items.failOnError: Pamene {true}, zolakwika zosayembekezereka zimalephera kuchitapo kanthu; pamene {false}, zolakwika ndi machenjezo.

translatorInputs.heading: Womasulira pempho athandizira
translatorInputs.intro: Izi zimapanga mapu mwachindunji pa magawo a mafunso a Azure AI Translator v3. Aliyense ndi wosankha; ndi Womasulira defaults ntchito pamene unset.
translatorInputs.caption: Womasulira pempho athandizira

items.categoryId: Gulu la Azure {customTranslatorLink} - batani la makampani / gawo / kamvekedwe. Kutumizidwa monga {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} kapena {html}. Gwiritsani ntchito {html} pokhapokha ngati mtengo wanu wa chuma ndi zidutswa zenizeni za HTML.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, kapena {deleted}. Imayang'anira momwe mawu otukwana amatulutsidwa m'matembenuzidwe.
items.allowFallback: Pamene {false}, Womasulira amabweza cholakwika m'malo mobwerera ku dongosolo lonse ngati {categoryId} lanu lilibe kutumizidwa kwa malo ogulitsira.

resilienceInputs.heading: Kukhazikika ndi chitetezo cha placeholder
resilienceInputs.intro: Zolowetsa izi zimayang'anira momwe zochitikazo zimakhalira pamene Womasulira akuchepetsa pempho lanu komanso momwe amateteza zizindikiro za placeholder monga {mustache} kapena {indexZero} kuti asawonongeke panthawi yomasulira.
resilienceInputs.caption: Kukhazikika ndi chitetezo cha placeholder

items.maxRetries: Kuyesayesa kwakukulu pa mayankho osakhalitsa a HTTP ({statusCodes}). Chiwerengero chonse cha mafoni a HTTP pa pempho lililonse ndi {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Kapu (mu milliseconds) pa tulo tum'mbuyo kalikonse. Mchitidwewu umalemekeza mutu woyankha {retryAfter} wa Azure ndendende pamene alipo; apo ayi imagwiritsa ntchito jittered exponential backoff yotsekedwa pamtengo uwu.
items.protectPlaceholders: Pamene {true} (kusakhulupirika), placeholders monga {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ndi HTML mabungwe amasinthidwa ndi zizindikiro za sentinel musanayambe kumasulira ndikubwezeretsedwa pambuyo pake. Kuletsa pokhapokha ngati gwero lanu mwadala lili ndi malemba enieni omwe ayenera kutanthauzidwa.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ma regexes olekanitsidwa ndi Newline (popanda delimiters) adawonjezera ku malo osakhulupirika, mwachitsanzo {angleToken} kwa chizolowezi cha chizindikiro.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-olekanitsidwa glob zitsanzo zogwirizana ndi makiyi parser-mlingo (JSON madontho njira, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF wagawo {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). Makiyi ofananira amagwetsedwa kuchokera ku pempho la Womasulira ndipo amadutsa ndi mtengo wawo wa gwero wosungidwa.

items.summaryDetails: Chidule cha Markdown choyenera thupi la PR kapena chidule cha ntchito.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} pamene Baibulo limodzi kapena angapo atsopano anapangidwa.

formats.title: Mawonekedwe a fayilo
formats.lede: Mitundu isanu ndi umodzi yozungulira. Mchitidwewu umawerenga fayilo iliyonse ya gwero-locale, kumasulira makhalidwe, ndikulemba mchimwene pa malo aliwonse.
formats.namingConvention: Mafayilo onse amagwiritsa ntchito msonkhano wa dzina la {namingConvention}.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET resource files. Amamasulira malemba amkati a mfundo iliyonse ya {dataValue}, kusunga ndemanga ndi metadata.
resx.specLabel: Microsoft Phunzirani - Zothandizira mu mafayilo a .resx

xliff.blurb: Zolemba za OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Amamasulira {source} lililonse ndikulemba zotsatira zake m'{target} lofananira, ndikukhazikitsa {trgLang} a malo.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Kumasulira {msgid} / {msgidPlural} lililonse m'mawonekedwe {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Mafayilo a JSON odzisankhira. Zinthu zomwe zili ndi zisa zimaphwanyidwa ndi {delimiter} delimiter kuti zimasuliridwe, kenako zimapangidwanso pazotulutsa. Makiyi a madontho ({dottedKey}) amasungidwa mawu.

ini.blurb: Mafayilo osavuta {keyValue} (Win32-style INI kapena config iliyonse yotsetsereka). Mitu ya magawo ndi ndemanga zimasungidwa.
ini.specLabel: Mtundu wa fayilo ya INI pa Wikipedia

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources - lathyathyathya {keyValue} awiriawiri omwe amagwiritsidwa ntchito ngati mnzake wa malemba ku {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Zitsimikizo zozungulira
roundTrip.body: Suite yoyeserera imatsimikizira byte-for-byte kuzungulira-tripping kwa zoyimira zoimira mtundu uliwonse. Ngati mtundu wa quirk umaphwanya kuzungulira-tripping mu codebase yanu, chonde {issueLink} ndi chitsanzo chochepa.

recipes.title: Maphikidwe
recipes.lede: Njira zofala zomasulira zotumizira: monorepos, glossaries, magulu amwambo, kuthamanga kouma, ndi kulamulira mawu.

pullRequest.heading: Tsegulani pempho lokoka pambuyo pa kuthamanga kulikonse

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: kumasulira kwakukulu pa phukusi lililonse

glossary.heading: Glossary ya mayina amtundu ndi mawu a mankhwala
glossary.body: Mawu a glossary amagwiritsidwa ntchito {after} kumasulira, kotero zotsatira zomasuliridwa ndi makina zimasunga chizindikiro chanu chomwe mumakonda ngakhale pamene chitsanzocho chinasinthanitsa ndi chofanana.

customCategory.heading: Gulu la Womasulira Mwambo (makampani / gawo)
customCategory.body: Phunzitsani gulu la Azure {customTranslatorLink} pa corpus yomwe imagwira mawu anu a makampani ndi mawu (malamulo, zamankhwala, malonda, zomangamanga zamkati, ndi zina zotero) ndikudutsa ID yake kudzera pa {categoryId}. Iyi ndi mawu amphamvu kwambiri omwe Azure amapereka.

tone.heading: Kulamulira kwa kamvekedwe + kugwa kokhwima
tone.body: Phatikizani {categoryId} Womasulira Wachizolowezi ndi {profanityAction} ndi {allowFallbackFalse} kuti mugwiritse ntchito mawu osasinthasintha ndikulephera kugwira ntchito ngati gulu losankhidwa lilibe kutumizidwa kwa imodzi mwa malo anu omwe mukufuna.

dryRun.heading: Kuthamanga kouma musanayambe kuyatsa ntchito
dryRun.body: Mchitidwewu umatulutsabe zotsatira zachidule ndi chidule cha sitepe, koma palibe mafayilo omwe amalembedwa. Phatikizani ndi {failOnErrorFalse} kuti muwonetsetse nkhani iliyonse ngati chenjezo pamene mukubwereza.

faq.title: Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri
faq.lede: Mayankho ofulumira a mafunso omwe amabwera nthawi zambiri mukamatengera zochitazo.

azure.heading: Kodi zochitikazo zimalankhula bwanji ndi Azure?
azure.body: Kudzera mu {azureSdkLink} SDK yovomerezeka ya Microsoft, yosanjikiza pa {corePipelineLink}. Izi zimakupatsirani kuti muyesenso zokha pa {statusCodes}, zolemba zopempha ndi zitsanzo zoyankha, ndi kusamalira mutu wotsimikizika kwaulere - zonse zomwe zinali zoyimbira {axios} pamanja. Malo ogwirira ntchito pagulu (zolowetsa, zotuluka, zotuluka za fayilo) sizisinthika.

tone.heading: Chifukwa chiyani matembenuzidwe nthawi zina amakhala opanda mtundu kapena opanda mawu?
tone.body: Kumasulira kwa makina kumakhala chitsanzo chachikulu. Mabatani atatu amathandiza: {glossaryLink} kwa mawu ovuta, {customTranslatorLink} kwa zitsanzo zabwino zophunzitsidwa pa kamvekedwe ndi mawu, ndi {profanityAction} kupukuta kapena mbendera mawu otukwana.

duplicateFiles.heading: Kodi ndingapewe bwanji kumasulira fayilo yomweyo kawiri?
duplicateFiles.body: Yambitsani kayendedwe ka ntchito pa {paths} omwe amagwirizana ndi mafayilo anu a gwero-locale okha, mwachitsanzo {sourceGlob}. Mchitidwewu umaphatikizaponso fyuluta yake ya fayilo pa fayilo pamene {githubToken} yakhazikitsidwa, kuchepetsa ntchito ku mafayilo mu commit yaposachedwa.

offline.heading: Kodi ndingathe kuyendetsa zochitikazo pa intaneti?
offline.body: Osati kwenikweni - Azure AI Translator ndi ubongo wothamanga. Koma mutha kuthamanga ndi {dryRunTrue} kuti mutsimikizire parsing ndi config popanda kupanga zopempha zilizonse za HTTP zomasulira.

node.heading: Kodi ndi mtundu wanji wa Node womwe mchitidwewu umayenda?
node.body: v3 imayenda pa GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} nthawi yothamanga. JavaScript yophatikizidwa imagwirizana ndi Node 20, 22, ndi 24, zomwe ndi zomwe CI imayesa.

dist.heading: Kodi {distDir} ophatikizidwa amachokera kuti?
dist.body: Zochita za GitHub JS zimatumiza JS yawo yosonkhanitsidwa mu nkhokwe. Ntchito ya {distBuild} imamanganso pambuyo pa kuphatikiza kulikonse ku {mainBranch} ngati idzayendayenda, ndipo {distCheck} imatseka ma PR omwe angatsike zotulutsa zachikale.

formats.heading: Nanga bwanji mitundu ina yothandizira?
formats.body: Lero: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} ngati mukufuna wina - mawonekedwe a parser ndi ang'onoang'ono (parse → mapu → kugwiritsa ntchito matembenuzidwe → mtundu) ndipo zopereka zimalandiridwa.

translations.title: Matembenuzidwe
translations.lede: Tsambali limamasuliridwa ndi Resource Translator palokha, pa kukankha kulikonse kwakukulu, m'chinenero chilichonse chomwe Azure AI Translator imathandizira.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} pakali pano akuperekedwa - {pendingCount} podikira kuthamanga kwa {workflowName} wotsatira.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Fufuzani ndi chilankhulo, code, kapena dzina lachibadwidwe...
translations.noLocales: Palibe malo omwe amafanana ndi fyuluta imeneyo.

steps.source: Fayilo ya gwero la Chingerezi imakhala ku {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Kukankha kuti kukhudza izo kick off {workflowLink}, amene amathamanga {thisAction} motsutsana palokha.
steps.fanOut: Zochitikazo zimapita kumalo aliwonse omwe amathandizidwa ndi Azure AI Translator (okonzedwa mu {configPath}) ndikulemba mchimwene {messagesLocaleJson} pa chandamale.
steps.pullRequest: Pempho lokoka limatsegulidwa ndi matembenuzidwe atsopano. Kuphatikiza kumafalitsanso tsambali ndi makhadi odzaza.

translations.poweredBy: Zoyendetsedwa ndi Resource Translator ndi Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Kuthandizira
contributing.lede: Malipoti a cholakwika, zopempha zamawonekedwe, ndi zopempha zokoka zonse zimalandiridwa. Mchitidwewu ndi waung'ono mokwanira kuti ukhale wochezeka kwa othandizira nthawi yoyamba.

steps.tests: Lembani mayeso ozungulira a parse → mtundu ndikugwiritsa ntchitoTranslations.

coverage.heading: Mipata yophimba
coverage.body: The Jest config imakhazikitsa chidziwitso chochepa. Khodi yatsopano iyenera kusunga mawu + mizere pamwamba pa 78% ndikugwira ntchito pamwamba pa 90%. Onjezani zokonzekera ndi mayesero pambali pa kusintha kwanu.

docsSite.heading: Malo olembera
docsSite.body: Foda ya {docsDir} ndi polojekiti ya Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Thamangani {npmInstall} kumeneko kamodzi, kenako {npmRunDev} kuti muwone m'deralo. Ntchito ya {pagesWorkflow} imatumiza ma doc ku GitHub Pages pa kuphatikiza kulikonse.

changelog.title: Kusintha kwa Kusintha
changelog.lede: Chidule chapamwamba cha kutulutsidwa. The canonical, authoritative changelog amakhala mu CHANGELOG.md mu nkhokwe.

items.newInputs: Zolowetsa zatsopano: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, kuphatikiza mabatani apamwamba a Translator {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, ndi {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Gwero locale tsopano likutumizidwanso ku Translator monga {fromLocale} kotero zingwe zazifupi sizikudziwika zokha.
items.resilience: {label} kuyesanso kwadzidzidzi pa mayankho osakhalitsa a HTTP ({statusCodes}) kulemekeza mutu wa {retryAfter} wa Azure - kumagwera kumbuyo kwa jittered exponential pamene kulibe. Tunable kudzera pa {maxRetries} ndi {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: Zizindikiro za {label} monga {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ndi mabungwe a HTML amakulungidwa mu alonda asanamasuliridwe ndikubwezeretsedwa pambuyo pake, kotero Translator amasiya mangling i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Sinthani kudzera pa {protectPlaceholders}; Tambasula ndi {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} latsopano {noTranslatePatterns} athandizira madontho makiyi ofanana ndi pempho Womasulira kwathunthu (amasunga mfundo gwero mayina mtundu, zizindikiro zolakwika, etc.). Zikugwirizana ndi mawonekedwe a glob motsutsana ndi makiyi amtundu wa parser (njira ya JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). {issue}
items.glossary: Chithandizo cha glossary, chidule cha sitepe kudzera pa {coreSummary}.
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Malo a Astro + Tailwind v4 docs okhala ndi kusintha kwa mawonedwe ndi Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA kudutsa. Ma glyphs a logo adasinthidwa kukhala njira kuti asalepherenso kusiyanitsa mtundu motsutsana ndi kuyimitsa kwa gradient, batani la {backToTop} likudzandira limagwiritsa ntchito {inert} pamene likubisika (m'malo mwa {ariaHidden} toggle yomwe idasiya tabbable), zigawo {formatsAstro} sizikugundananso ndi ma ID awo omutu, makadi atatu am'deralo tsopano amavumbula makhalidwe a BCP-47-valid {lang} ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), zolemba zobwerezabwereza {documentation} zizindikiro zodziwika bwino zimasokonezedwa pakati pa sidebar ndi footer,  ndipo tebulo lililonse la deta pa {inputs} / {configuration} zombo ndi mawu owerenga chophimba.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} tsopano imavala mawu ofunda / amber - osiyana ndi mtundu →accent womwe umagwiritsidwa ntchito polumikizana ndi mitu.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
